name: tank_polysemy_v1
description_a: Aquatic/container context — fish tanks, aquariums, water tanks, storage tanks, scuba tanks. The word 'tank' refers to a container for liquid or aquatic life.
description_b: Military/combat context — armored tanks, battle tanks, tank divisions, tank warfare. The word 'tank' refers to an armored military vehicle.

sentences_a.text: The aquarium's largest tank is filled with colorful fish and vibrant coral.
Every morning, she checks the water level in the fish tank to ensure a healthy environment.
During the dive, they noticed the scuba tank was almost empty and signaled to ascend.
A massive tank holds seawater for the marine creatures at the ocean exhibit.
After the storm, the rainwater tank was overflowing with fresh water.
The tropical fish swam gracefully around the ornate decorations inside the glass tank.
To maintain clarity, the tank's filter should be cleaned every two weeks.
Visitors were amazed by the giant turtle that inhabited the central tank of the aquarium.
As a precaution, the diver brought an extra oxygen tank on the deep-sea expedition.
The reef tank replicates a natural coral habitat, complete with anemones and clownfish.
The aquarium in the corner of the room housed a large saltwater tank with vibrant marine life.
After setting up the filtration system, she filled the large storage tank with clean, fresh water.
The scuba diver checked his air gauge to ensure the tank was filled before exploring the underwater cave.
Children gazed in awe as a bright blue parrotfish swam through the coral in the display tank.
Ensuring proper temperature regulation in the fish tank is crucial for maintaining the health of the tropical species.
He carefully arranged rocks and plants to create a natural environment inside the new aquarium tank.
The biologist studied the algae growth on the walls of the experimental marine tank.
Maintaining a saltwater tank requires careful monitoring of salinity and pH levels on a daily basis.
A school of tiny neon tetras darted in and out of the hiding places in their spacious tank.
The volunteers filled the emergency relief tank with fresh water to assist the stranded marine animals.

sentences_b.text: The rumble of the approaching tank sent vibrations through the ground, alerting the soldiers of its presence.
Camouflaged in the dense forest, the tank remained hidden, waiting for the signal to advance.
Under the cover of night, the tank division moved stealthily to surprise the enemy forces.
With precision and coordination, the tank brigade launched a swift offensive across the desert terrain.
The engineer worked tirelessly to repair the damaged tank, ensuring it would be battle-ready by sunrise.
As the battle raged on, the tank provided critical support to the infantry units pushing forward.
From the command post, the officer directed the tank units to fortify the western perimeter.
The new tank model featured advanced armor and weaponry, making it a formidable force on the battlefield.
Despite the treacherous conditions, the tank convoy made its way through the snow-covered valley.
In the strategy room, the generals planned the deployment of tank brigades for the upcoming operation.
The commander ordered the tank unit to secure the bridge before nightfall.
As dawn broke, the tank engines roared to life, ready for the day's mission.
The crew spent hours maintaining the tank, ensuring it was battle-ready at all times.
A sudden explosion rocked the battlefield, but the tank pressed forward undeterred.
Strategically positioned on the hillside, the tank provided cover for advancing troops.
The tank regiment moved swiftly through the desert, leaving a trail of dust behind.
With its armor glinting in the sun, the tank led the charge into enemy territory.
Night vision goggles allowed the tank crew to navigate through the dense fog efficiently.
Amidst the chaos, the tank maintained communication with headquarters to receive new orders.
The tank division's arrival turned the tide of battle, giving hope to exhausted soldiers.

sentences_neutral.text: She watched as the maintenance crew carefully cleaned the large tank, ensuring it was ready for the next experiment.
The new energy-efficient tank design has captured the interest of several researchers in sustainable technologies.
As they toured the facility, the guide explained the importance of each tank in the complex filtration system.
He pondered how the tank's unique shape could influence the dynamics of fluid movement inside it.
During the workshop, participants were asked to think about innovative ways to utilize a versatile tank in various industries.
